title: Le secret de Monte-Cristo
writer: Pierre Laroche, Denis Marion, Léon Treich
actors: Pierre Brasseur, Georges Vitray, Pierre Larquey
plot: One of Alexandre Dumas's most popular adventure novels is "The Count of Monte-Cristo". What is little known is that the famous writer made up neither its plot nor its characters. Dumas actually heard the true story of a man named ...
